text: I wake up at 6:30 every morning and start my day with a glass of water and a short meditation. After a quick breakfast, I leave for work, where I usually spend eight hours at my desk. I make sure to take a proper lunch break and avoid working through it. In the evening, I go for a thirty-minute run or do some yoga at home. Consistency is important to me, so I try to keep the same routine even on weekends. After dinner, I read for a while before bed. This simple schedule helps me stay organized and feel balanced.
